demo.section.title: Echoes of the Ancients
demo.section.intro: Walk in the footsteps of cultivators who conquered the heavens — feel their realm, skills, and fortune before your own journey begins.
demo.enter.note: This is a guided echo — your own journey is not lost.
demo.enter.confirm_note: Your current journey will be paused safely. Nothing is lost until you choose to return.
demo.ancient.void_walker.name: Mo Xu
demo.ancient.void_walker.lore: Once a mortal of a fallen village, he walked the void path to its end — Void Spirit realm, awakened fractures, a spirit fox at his side. Walk as he did and feel the dao of reversal.
demo.ancient.sword_ancestor.name: Lin Feng
demo.ancient.sword_ancestor.lore: His blade fell like starlight across a hundred sects. Core Formation peak, sword and lightning awakened — a master of the three-hit path and the dodge between breaths.
demo.ancient.flame_sovereign.name: Yan Lei
demo.ancient.flame_sovereign.epithet: Flame Sovereign of the Nascent Soul
demo.ancient.flame_sovereign.lore: He burned through nine heavenly tribulations. Nascent Soul early, twin flame and life mend awakened — feel breakthrough power and the cultivation ladder he climbed.
demo.lore.fallen_village.memory_01: The village bell still rings in the void — though no one remains to hear it.
